title: tools.yaml — a specialist agent's tools
description: Schema for agents/<name>/tools.yaml. Each tool maps to the n8n tool/sub-workflow node the install-time compiler injects. Writes route ONLY through request_write_action. See agent-folder.spec.md.

tools.description: The agent's tools (empty for a no-tools agent). Drawn from the known set; never free SQL or a direct write tool.
